-        # x: [B, T, N, c_in], adj: [N, N]

         support = torch.einsum('ij,btjc->btic', adj, x)

         out = torch.einsum('btic,co->btio', support, self.weight) + self.bias

         return out

@@ -20,7 +20,6 @@
     def __init__(self, c_in, c_out, kt=3, dropout=0.0):

         super().__init__()

         pad = (kt - 1) // 2

-        # Gated Temporal Convolution (GLU): output 2*c_out then split

         self.tconv = nn.Conv2d(c_in, c_out * 2, (kt, 1), padding=(pad, 0))

         self.gconv = GraphConv(c_out, c_out)

         self.ln = nn.LayerNorm(c_out)

@@ -29,19 +28,46 @@
 

     def forward(self, x, adj):

         res = x if self.residual is None else self.residual(x)

-        x = self.tconv(x)                      # [B, 2*c_out, T, N]

+        x = self.tconv(x)

         x, gate = torch.chunk(x, 2, dim=1)

-        x = x * torch.sigmoid(gate)             # GLU

+        x = x * torch.sigmoid(gate)

         x = self.dropout(x)

-        x = x.permute(0, 2, 3, 1)               # [B, T, N, c_out]

+        x = x.permute(0, 2, 3, 1)

         x = self.gconv(x, adj)

-        x = x.permute(0, 3, 1, 2)               # [B, c_out, T, N]

+        x = x.permute(0, 3, 1, 2)

         x = self.dropout(x)

         x = x + res

-        x = x.permute(0, 2, 3, 1)               # [B, T, N, c_out]

+        x = x.permute(0, 2, 3, 1)

         x = self.ln(x)

-        x = x.permute(0, 3, 1, 2)               # [B, c_out, T, N]

+        x = x.permute(0, 3, 1, 2)

         return F.relu(x)

+

+class TemporalAttention(nn.Module):

+    def __init__(self, hidden, heads=4, dropout=0.1):

+        super().__init__()

+        self.attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(hidden, heads, dropout=dropout, batch_first=True)

+        self.norm1 = nn.LayerNorm(hidden)

+        self.ffn = nn.Sequential(

+            nn.Linear(hidden, hidden * 4),

+            nn.ReLU(),

+            nn.Dropout(dropout),

+            nn.Linear(hidden * 4, hidden),

+            nn.Dropout(dropout)

+        )

+        self.norm2 = nn.LayerNorm(hidden)

+

+    def forward(self, x):

+        B, C, T, N = x.shape

+        x = x.permute(0, 3, 2, 1)

+        x = x.reshape(B * N, T, C)

+        attn_out, _ = self.attn(x, x, x)

+        x = x + attn_out

+        x = self.norm1(x)

+        ffn_out = self.ffn(x)

+        x = x + ffn_out

+        x = self.norm2(x)

+        x = x.view(B, N, T, C).permute(0, 3, 2, 1)

+        return x

 

 class TrafficModel(nn.Module):

     def __init__(self, num_nodes=207, in_len=12, out_len=12, hidden=512, layers=4, dropout=0.3):

@@ -49,35 +75,33 @@
         self.input_proj = nn.Conv2d(1, hidden, 1)

         self.blocks = nn.ModuleList([STBlock(hidden, hidden, dropout=dropout) for _ in range(layers)])

         self.skip_convs = nn.ModuleList([nn.Conv2d(hidden, hidden, 1) for _ in range(layers)])

-        self.out_proj = nn.Conv2d(hidden, 1, 1)

+        self.temporal_attn = TemporalAttention(hidden, heads=4, dropout=dropout)

+        self.out_proj = nn.Sequential(

+            nn.Conv2d(hidden, hidden, 1),

+            nn.ReLU(),

+            nn.Dropout(dropout),

+            nn.Conv2d(hidden, 1, 1)

+        )

         self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)

-

-        # Adaptive adjacency matrix (Graph WaveNet style)

         self.nodevec1 = nn.Parameter(torch.randn(num_nodes, 10), requires_grad=True)

         self.nodevec2 = nn.Parameter(torch.randn(10, num_nodes), requires_grad=True)

         nn.init.xavier_uniform_(self.nodevec1)

         nn.init.xavier_uniform_(self.nodevec2)

 

     def forward(self, x, adj):

-        # x: [B, T, N]

-        x_input = x.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, T, N]

+        x_input = x.unsqueeze(1)

         x = self.input_proj(x_input)

         x = self.dropout(x)

-

-        # Combine fixed and adaptive adjacency

         adp = F.softmax(F.relu(self.nodevec1 @ self.nodevec2), dim=1)

         adj = adj + adp

-

         skip = 0

         for i, block in enumerate(self.blocks):

             x = block(x, adj)

             s = self.skip_convs[i](x)

             skip = skip + s

-

         x = F.relu(skip)

-        x = self.out_proj(x)  # [B, 1, T, N]

-

-        # Residual: add last observed timestep

-        last = x_input[:, :, -1:, :]  # [B, 1, 1, N]

+        x = self.temporal_attn(x)

+        x = self.out_proj(x)

+        last = x_input[:, :, -1:, :]

         x = x + last

-        return x.squeeze(1)  # [B, T, N]

+        return x.squeeze(1)

+def weighted_l1_loss(pred, target, weights):

     return (torch.abs(pred - target) * weights).mean()
